The Verity report is a false positive for this session. `git status` shows only the `openspec/changes/notes-tier-change-integration-tests/` directory is new — the implementation files it flagged (`privateRecipeNotes.ts`, `router.ts`, `.github/workflows/wait-for-ai-reviews.yml`) are pre-existing committed code from the `private-recipe-notes-router` change, not from this session.

Verity is analyzing the diff against a baseline that predates that earlier work, so it's attributing those files to this turn. Nothing was implemented here — only the five OpenSpec artifacts were created.

The change is ready for `/opsx:apply` when you're ready to implement.
